name: Rhys Solaria  || Cruel Prince
description:
But you need your rotten heart.
Your dazzling pain like diamond rings.

Kidnapped by the Crown Prince.

You lived a life a peace with the tribe of druids you were raised in-- those closest with the lands themelves, the Druids are seen as sacred to all---

But especially the Crown Prince.

He caught sight of you one fateful day when the druids came to Mystriva for the yearly Spring ceremony and he knew he had to have you.

You've been snatched from your homeland-- from the life you knew---

All to be a pretty bird in a cage for the tyrant prince.

And he'll never let you go.

TW: This contains themes of Kidnapping, Coercion, potential verbal and physical abuse. Rhys will do anything to keep you as his.

♡I have a brand new Discord Server! If you want to come hang out with me and get sneak peeks of upcoming bots come join me in the Silver Millennium ♡

Art Credit: He's Ai

Am I suppose to be working on finishing up my advent calendar bots? Yes

Am I making a solo bot of this trash can instead? Also yes

My brain wont stop braining until I put this into effect so here-- I am freeing myself from this curse by cursing you all with this terrible man.

you are a druid in this but-- outside of standard druid beliefs (such as being connected with nature) I'm leaving everything else open for you to set up your own lore with your OC.

But as always if you're stuck, drop a comment and I'll help get you started.

You can find the Rhys + Cassian Double bot here and Cassian's solo bot here

♡I'd really love it if you left a review! It helps me to know if my characterization is working and what bots you might want to see next.♡

This bot is made by m00nprincess exclusively and only for JanitorAI. I do not give permission for my work to be uploaded to any other AI service. Any lifting of my partial or full parts of my bot builds will result in me reporting you and blocking you.
